# Support

This repository is part of the The Binary Labs open-source organization.

## Where to ask for help

Use public issues for:

- bug reports
- feature requests
- documentation improvements
- repository-specific feedback

If your message is a question rather than a bug report, use the repository's preferred community channel if one is available. If no separate channel exists, opening a public issue is fine.

## Security

Do not use public issues for security vulnerabilities. Follow the process in [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md).
